channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Navigating the distracted world
item.description: Navigating the Distracted World Imagine drifting to sleep with a heart full of contentment. This simple joy could transform our daily lives, eliminating countless so-called “necessities.” Yet, we’re trapped in a whirlwind of distractions. Technology and these “needs” are evolving faster than our ability to live optimally. And this trend is only accelerating. True happiness lies in minimizing distractions and embracing the core elements of our humanity. Good food, good routines, good work, good people.

item.title: 10 forms
item.description: Matsya - Water Earth is hidden by it. Its what constitutes life around us. We started off at the sea. Tiny blob. Single cell. That’s us. The first form of life. Water has since been a vital part of who we are. 70% of us, are in water. … To be continued
